order.title: Commission Castle Keep
order.hostnameHelp: Use the keep name to identify the castle keep. The fiefdom does not need to be valid or registered. One period is required in the keep name. Other examples: database.local, web.keep or your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Note: Secret Sigil must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, a special character.
order.contactSales: Please consult our royal sales court.
order.autoRenewNotice: The tribute shall automatically renew after every month at {cost} until canceled.
order.tosAcknowledgement: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are commissioning a tribute product that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is tithed to the sealed coin you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the subject portal select the active service and click the Withdraw link or dispatch carrier pigeon to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Present My Commission below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.iAgreeToTerms: I have read the terms above and I agree.
